nasb.text: Indeed, the Lord will comfort Zion; He will comfort all her waste places. And her wilderness He will make like Eden, And her desert like the garden of the Lord; Joy and gladness will be found in her, Thanksgiving and sound of a melody.

esv.text: For the Lord  comforts Zion; he comforts all her waste places and makes her wilderness like Eden, her desert like the garden of the Lord; joy and gladness will be found in her, thanksgiving and the voice of song.

cnv.text: 耶和華必安慰錫安， 他要安慰它的一切荒場， 使它的曠野像伊甸園一樣， 使它的荒地像耶和華的園子一般， 在其中必有歡喜快樂、 感謝和歌聲。

ccb.text: 我必安慰锡安和锡安所有的荒场， 使旷野像伊甸园， 使沙漠变成我的园囿， 里面有欢喜、快乐、感谢和歌颂的声音。

csbs.text: 耶和华必安慰锡安， 安慰锡安所有的废墟， 使她的旷野如伊甸， 使她的荒漠像耶和华的园子； 其中必有欢喜和快乐， 必有感谢和歌唱的声音。
